message:
chore(ci): refresh certification reports, event logs, VCR fixtures, and beads issue tracker

Auto-generated artifacts updated by concurrent agent sessions:

Beads issue tracker (.beads/issues.jsonl):
- Close completed phase-1 evidence link lineage and regression guard
  tasks (bd-3ar8v.2.8.13, bd-3ar8v.2.8.14)
- Update status on in-progress evidence adjudication work

Full suite gate reports (tests/full_suite_gate/):
- Refresh certification_events.jsonl, full_suite_events.jsonl with
  latest run timestamps
- Update certification_verdict.json, full_suite_verdict.json,
  preflight_verdict.json, artifact_retention_report.json, and
  waiver_audit.json

Cross-platform reports (tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/):
- Update platform_events.jsonl, platform_report.json, platform_report.md

Extension conformance (tests/ext_conformance/reports/):
- Refresh CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md and conformance_summary.json

VCR fixtures (tests/fixtures/vcr/):
- Update Gemini provider cassettes (auth 401, bad request 400, rate
  limit 429, simple text, tool call, unicode) with latest timestamps

Performance reports (tests/perf/reports/):
- Update PERF_BUDGETS.md, budget_events.jsonl, budget_summary.json

Security compat (tests/security_compat/):
- Refresh security_compat_dashboard.json and security_compat_events.jsonl

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
